node.text: James created and released his first game for the gaming community recently, which he found exciting.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "James") on James (Score: 1.00)
Matched atom(content =~ "Witcher-inspired game completion") on Session 27 (Score: 0.97)
Matched atom(content =~ "how long complete game") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.58)

node.text: The game 'Witcher 3' inspired James to create his own game, pushing him to make something special.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "James") on James (Score: 1.00)
Matched atom(content =~ "Witcher-inspired game completion") on Session 27 (Score: 0.97)

node.text: James feels fulfilled seeing players engage with the game world he created.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "James") on James (Score: 1.00)

node.text: James expressed a desire to create more games in different genres and explore new ideas in game development.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "James") on James (Score: 1.00)
Matched atom(content =~ "Witcher-inspired game completion") on Session 27 (Score: 0.97)

node.text: James got the idea for the virtual world from a stranger he saw while walking his dogs and found inspiring.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "James") on James (Score: 1.00)
Matched atom(content =~ "Witcher-inspired game completion") on Session 6 (Score: 0.97)

node.text: John supports James and expresses gratitude for John's support.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "James") on James (Score: 1.00)
Matched atom(content =~ "Witcher-inspired game completion") on Session 27 (Score: 0.97)

node.text: James worked on a programming project combining gaming with programming, creating a virtual world inspired by Witcher 3 with a game character he designed.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "James") on James (Score: 1.00)
Matched atom(content =~ "Witcher-inspired game completion") on Session 6 (Score: 0.97)

node.text: James expressed an interest in traveling together with John to a new country next year and plans to start looking for options.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "James") on James (Score: 1.00)
Matched atom(content =~ "Witcher-inspired game completion") on Session 6 (Score: 0.97)

node.text: James's apartment lost power three days ago, disrupting his game progress as he forgot to save.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "James") on James (Score: 1.00)
Matched atom(content =~ "how long complete game") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.79)

node.text: James tried Cyberpunk 2077 yesterday and found it addictive.
